title: Data Analyst - Marketing Intelligence
required_skills: 5+ years experience as Data Analyst (ideally in marketing/e-commerce/digital growth)
Degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science or quantitative field
Marketing metrics, attribution, and campaign performance understanding
Data storytelling for technical and non-technical audiences
bonus_skills: Travel, e-commerce or digital marketing industry experience
A/B testing, geo testing, causal inference
matched_skills: Power BI (certified PL-300) and Looker Studio as BI/dashboarding tools
Campaign performance analysis and KPI tracking
Data storytelling — C-level reporting across all roles
missing_skills: SQL — critical hard requirement, not mentioned in CV
Quantitative degree (Stats/Math/Physics/CS) — CV has Management/Marketing degrees
core_responsibilities: Translate data into actionable insights shaping marketing strategy and investments
Build dashboards and reports highlighting trends
Partner with marketing stakeholders to define KPIs and measure success
Conduct deep dives on performance drivers and anomalies
Ensure marketing data quality and consistency
recommended_emphasis: Lead with Power BI (PL-300) and Looker Studio as strong BI tool match
Emphasise marketing attribution and multi-source data analysis experience
Highlight HSBC financial analytics and dashboard building as data quality/consistency work
Be transparent about SQL gap — this may be a hard filter
Frame degree as business analytics-adjacent (Management & Entrepreneurship with analytical focus)

company_info.size_raw: not explicitly stated, estimated from company knowledge
